examples: public opinion turned when it was revealed that the president had an affair with a White House intern

meanings.definition: turn inside out or upside down

examples: The Republicans were overruled when the House voted on the bill
He revoked the ban on smoking

meanings.definition: reverse the position, order, relation, or condition of
examples: when forming a question, invert the subject and the verb
the reversed collar looked as good as new

meanings.definition: turned about in order or relation
